channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Students take control of bus after driver has medical episode
item.description: Hero middle school students took control of their school bus after the driver had a medical emergency; it was caught on camera.

item.title: Iran live updates: Rubio dismisses Iran peace proposal, stresses nuclear issue
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: 82nd Airborne soldiers train on drone-countering maneuvers used in Ukraine
item.description: Soldiers are training for drone-on-drone combat using Bumblebee drones, which have been used in Ukraine and are being sent to U.S. training centers in...

item.title: WATCH: Taylor Swift files toÂ trademark voice, image amid AI misuse
item.description: The singer is filing three new trademark applications after her likeness has been used without permission for numerous AI fakes.
